creator: kick.christoph@googlemail.com
text:
On 12/09/10 02:30, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of devel/rubygem-ffi,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/152949 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/152949
> 

I approve the patch. Thank you very much!
